title: Reach the protected admin area after authentication
description: Verifies that an authenticated admin user can access the protected admin area and see the admin dashboard.
category: Protected access for /staff and /admin after authentication

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the admin area entry point
Verify the admin dashboard is displayed

title: Reach the protected staff area after authentication
description: Verifies that an authenticated staff user can access the protected staff area and see the staff dashboard.
category: Protected access for /staff and /admin after authentication

steps.description: Fill in the login credentials with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Click the staff area entry point
Verify the staff dashboard is displayed

title: Submit a restaurant order with cash payment
description: Verifies that a guest can add menu items to the cart, complete checkout with cash payment, and see the order confirmation state.

steps.description: Add an item to the cart
Verify a confirmation state is displayed
Verify an active order state is displayed

title: Admin can reach the management dashboard after signing in
description: This verifies that an administrator can authenticate and reach the protected admin dashboard successfully.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the management dashboard is displayed

description: Verifies that a guest can add items to the cart, choose a dining location during checkout, and successfully submit the order.

Verify an active order state is displayed

title: Admin can open the dashboard from the protected route

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

steps.description: Verify wallet balance and history are displayed

title: Staff can open the portal from the protected route

Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify protected staff content is displayed

title: Open the mapped service route by scanning a valid QR code
description: Verifies that scanning a valid QR code in the scanner opens the mapped destination service route.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the admin portal content is displayed

title: Book a hotel stay with valid dates
description: Verifies that a guest can select a room, choose a valid stay range, and receive a booking confirmation.

steps.description: Verify a booking confirmation is displayed

title: Admin route requires authentication before access
description: This verifies that a user must authenticate before reaching the admin dashboard from the protected route.

steps.description: Verify the admin sign-in experience is displayed

title: Keep shopping and see updated restaurant totals
description: Verifies that a guest can continue shopping after adding items and see the cart totals update before checkout.

steps.description: Add an item to the cart
Add another item to the cart
Verify updated cart totals are displayed

title: Staff route requires authentication before access
description: This verifies that a user must authenticate before reaching the staff dashboard from the protected route.

steps.description: Verify the staff sign-in experience is displayed

title: Reserve a hotel room with valid dates
description: A customer can select a hotel room, choose a valid stay range, and receive a booking confirmation.

steps.description: Fill a valid check-in date into the check-in date field
Fill a valid check-out date into the check-out date field
Verify a booking confirmation is visible
Verify the reservation details are displayed

title: Book pool access with a valid ticket selection
description: Verifies that a guest can choose a valid pool ticket quantity and type and submit a successful booking.

steps.description: Verify a booking confirmation is displayed

title: Book pool access tickets successfully
description: A customer can choose a pool ticket quantity and type, submit the booking, and receive a confirmation.

steps.description: Verify a pool reservation confirmation is visible
Verify the booking details are displayed

title: Update profile details successfully
description: A customer can edit personal details in the profile area and see the updated profile information after saving.

steps.description: Edit personal details with valid information
Verify the updated profile information is displayed
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Edit profile details and save updates
description: Verifies that an authenticated customer can update personal profile details and see the saved information reflected in the profile view.
category: Phone OTP Authentication and Profile Access

steps.description: Update personal details with valid values
Verify a successful save confirmation is visible
Verify the updated profile details are displayed

title: See restaurant checkout validation when required selections are missing
description: Verifies that a guest who reaches checkout without completing required selections sees validation feedback and remains in checkout.

steps.description: Add an item to the cart
Submit the order without completing required selections
Verify a validation error is visible
Verify the checkout step remains open

title: See hotel date validation for an invalid stay range
description: Verifies that selecting an invalid hotel date range shows validation feedback and prevents reservation submission.

steps.description: Choose an invalid check-in and check-out date range
Verify a date validation error is visible
Verify the reservation form remains open

title: Keep profile data unchanged when validation fails
description: A customer entering invalid profile details sees validation feedback and the existing profile data remains unchanged.

steps.description: Edit personal details with invalid input
Verify a validation error is visible
Verify the current profile information remains displayed

title: Reject an incorrect phone OTP
description: Verifies that entering an incorrect OTP on the profile authentication step shows validation feedback and keeps the user on the verification step.
category: Phone OTP Authentication and Profile Access

steps.description: Verify OTP validation feedback is visible
Verify the verification step remains open

title: Reject an invalid pool ticket quantity
description: A customer entering an invalid pool ticket quantity sees validation feedback and cannot complete the booking.

steps.description: Verify a quantity validation error is visible
Verify the booking form remains available

title: See pool ticket quantity validation for an invalid selection
description: Verifies that choosing a zero or invalid pool ticket quantity shows validation feedback and blocks booking submission.

steps.description: Verify a quantity validation error is visible
Verify the booking form remains open

title: Reject a hotel booking with an invalid stay range
description: A customer who enters an invalid hotel date range sees validation feedback and stays on the booking form.

steps.description: Fill an invalid stay range into the date fields
Verify a date validation error is visible
Verify the booking form remains available

title: Show feedback when a QR code cannot be mapped
description: Verifies that scanning an unmapped or invalid QR code shows failure feedback and does not leave the scanner flow.

steps.description: Verify a scan failure message is visible
Verify the scanner view remains open
